channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What Steve Jobs Knew That AI Doesn’t
item.description: Humans are wired to respond to emotions, not AI algorithms.

item.title: Is this the world’s best smart-phone camera?
item.description: Leica is perhaps the most storied brand in photography. A portmanteau formed from the name of founder Ernst Leitz and the word “camera,” the first Lei...

item.title: Trump’s FTC chief says he’s not the ‘speech police,’ but reality has too liberal a bias on Apple News app
item.description: Andrew Ferguson urged Cook to review what is used on the Apple News feed and take corrective action.

item.title: More Than 455,000 Women Left the Workplace in 2025. Here’s How Companies Can Retain Them
Politicians scramble on data centers after putting their voters on the hook for Big Tech’s job-killing AI efforts
item.description: “What do you do when Big Tech, because of the very profitable nature of these data centers, can simply outbid grandma for power in the short run?”

item.title: You love your dog too much. Blame the broken American Dream and loss of purpose since the pandemic
item.description: Dogs aren’t just being used as a substitute for people. I believe Americans are turning to dogs to alleviate the erosion of social life itself.

item.title: Databricks’ CEO Just Dropped the Most Honest Advice About the Future of AI
item.description: Data company leaders aren’t interested in histrionics and hand-waving.

item.title: Trump is making foreign tourism great again. How much will he hurt the World Cup?
item.description: While the rest of the world saw a travel bump in 2025, with global international arrivals up 4%, the U.S. saw a downturn

item.title: 3 Tips for Handling Employees Passed Over for Promotion Through an Outside Hire
item.description: When a current staffer doesn’t move up and you fill the job with an external hire, try these approaches to avoid resentments.

item.title: Pinterest stock is falling off a cliff for a surprising reason: Here’s what’s driving the PINS collapse today
item.description: Investors in Pinterest (NYSE: PINS) are waking up to a wall of red this morning. The stock price of the popular digital image-sharing board has fallen...

item.title: Cut your 2025 tax bill with these 4 smart moves
item.description: The One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA) made some long-awaited permanent changes to the tax code . It also introduced short-term tax breaks that come w...

item.title: A Roman board game has mystified researchers for years. AI discovered how to play
item.description: Somewhere around the turn of the 20th century, archaeologists in Heerlen, Netherlands, came across an odd-looking smooth white stone. They knew the te...

item.title: Valentine’s Day office etiquette: Experts share the 80:20 rule for talking about your significant other at work—and the 3 times when it’s never okay
item.description: While Hallmark may want you to confess your undying love for your partner, perhaps these declarations are best left inside a card—and well away from t...

item.title: Listeria fears hit BJ’s Wholesale Club in several states. Avoid this recalled frozen salmon product
item.description: A Massachusetts-based seafood importer and distributor has recalled salmon that was sold across multiple states due to concerns that the product may b...

item.title: Why Arnold Schwarzenegger Says These 4 Words Will Help You Accomplish Your Biggest Goals
